title: ProjectFileTree
content:
# ProjectFileTree

Inherits from: KSDKModel, abc.ABC


## Methods


### from_tree(app_root: KPath, project_type: ProjectType, kelvin_app_flavour: ApplicationFlavour, template_parameters: Dict, kelvin_app_lang: Optional[ApplicationLanguage]) -> ProjectFileTree

Class method that must fill the Tree directories and respective files


### get_tree_dict(app_root: KPath) -> Dict

Returns a dictionary with the file tree associated with the class attributes


### fundamental_dirs() -> List[Directory]

A list of project's main directories


### optional_dirs() -> List[Directory]

A list of project's optional directories


### get_extra_template_parameters() -> Dict
